nameMeanings.name: Lynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhloinn and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn ).

English: habitational name from any of several places so called in Norfolk, in particular King's Lynn, an important center of the medieval wool trade. The placename is probably from an Old Welsh word cognate with Gaelic linn ‘pool, stream’.

variants.name: Lyn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Ding, Fatt, Tov, Yol, Yun.
Scottish and English: variant of   Lynn  .
Probably also an altered form of Dutch Van der Lijn (see Vanderlinden ).

variants.name: Linn
meanings: German: habitational name from a place called Linn, named with lin ‘swamp, bog, marsh’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Linto, formed with Old High German lind(i) ‘soft’.

variants.name: Lenn
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lynn  .

variants.name: Flynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Connor, Declan, Kieran, Aidan, Brigid, Cathal, Dermot, Donal, Eamon, John Patrick, Kiernan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Floinn ‘descendant of Flann’, a byname meaning ‘red(dish), ruddy’. There were families of this name in various parts of Ireland. This name has also been Anglicized as Lindsay .
English: from Middle English Flin, representing the Old Norse male personal name Fleinn.

variants.name: Lynne
meanings: Scottish or English: variant of   Lynn  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lynn was born in 1560, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, John Lynn, was 38 and his mother, Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Elizabeth Rissa Kirke. He died in 1625, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lynn est né en 1560, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Lynn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elizabeth Rissa Kirke. Il est décédé en 1625, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lynnが1560年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで生まれた時，父John Lynnは38歳，母Mrs Jon Bardsen Leinは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Rissa Kirkeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1625年にイギリススコットランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lynn(이)가 1560년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lynn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Jon Bardsen Lein(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Rissa Kirke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1625년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.
